comments:
Gallows Corner Flyover Refurbishment - [A12] Eastern Avenue East (All directions) at the junction of [A12] Colchester Road - Various restrictions, to facilitate the refurbishment of Gallows Corner Flyover. Full closure of the Flyover and the roundabout including all approaches in place.
Between 10-13 April, Gallows Corner roundabout will be closed to all vehicles, to facilitate reconstructing and resurfacing. From 24 April 22:00 to 26 April 05:00, A12 Colchester Road will be closed between Bryant Avenue & Gallows Corner to resurface the carriageway.
[A13] Ripple Road (Westbound) at the junction of Renwick Road - All lanes have been restored following an earlier building fire.
[A1205] Burdett Road (Both directions) at the junction of [A13] East India Dock Road - Lane restrictions in place to facilitate Thames Water works.

Woolwich Ferry One Boat Service - Woolwich Ferry  - [A2204] Ferry Approach (All approaches) at the junction of [A206] Woolwich Ferry Roundabout - The Woolwich Ferry is currently operating a one boat service due to essential vessel maintenance.
[A205] Waldram Crescent (All directions) at the junction of [B227] Perry Vale -  Temporary traffic lights in operation to facilitate Thames Water works.

[A23] Streatham Hill (Both directions) between [A205] Christchurch Road and Leigham Court Road - Various restrictions for TfL works. Lane restrictions, in place over the course of the works. There will be full overnight closures (Telford Avenue to Christchurch Road) between 22:00 to 05:00 on 21/06/2026 and 22/06/2026.

[A40] Westway (Both directions) between the A40 Northern Roundabout and the Marylebone Flyover. - Full closure of the A40 Westway and an eastbound lane closure on Harrow Road to facilitate joint replacement works.
King William Street (Southbound) at the junction of Lombard Street - Lane restrictions are in place for highway authority works.
[A302] Bressenden Place (Southbound) at the junction of [A302] Victoria Street - Lane closures are in place to facilitate works to the pavement.

[A400] Hampstead Road (Both directions) at the junction of Robert Street - Various restrictions in place, including temporary signals, for HS2 works. Additionally, Varndell Street is closed in both directions.
[A1020] Leamouth Road Roundabout (All directions) at the junction of [A1261] Aspen Way - Lane restrictions are in place to facilitate electrical cable works.
[A3203] Lambeth Bridge (Eastbound) between [A3036] A 3036 and [A3212] Millbank - Various restrictions in place either side of the bridge for junction improvement works.

[A101] Rotherhithe Tunnel (Both directions) between Rotherhithe Tunnel Approach and the junction of Jamaica Road and Lower Road - When there is congestion inside the Rotherhithe Tunnel, the Tunnel may be subject to short intermittent closures.
[A503] Camden Road (Both directions) at the junction of [A5203] Hillmarton Road - There is a contraflow in operation to facilitate emergency repairs to a leaking water main.
[A105] Green Lanes (Both directions) between Broomfield Lane and Oakthorpe Road - Temporary traffic signals are in place to facilitate electrical cable works.

[A503] Forest Road (All directions) at the junction of [B160] Wood Street - Temporary traffic signals are in place due to Borough Works.
[A400] Cambridge Circus (All directions) between [A400] Charing Cross Road and [A401] Shaftesbury Avenue - Temporary traffic signals are in use due to a fault with the permanent signals.

London Landmarks Half Marathon - [A3212] Whitehall (Both directions) between [A4] Charing Cross and [A3212] Parliament Street - Extensive road closures are in place across Westminster and the City of London to facilitate an annual running event. Phased road closures will be implemented from 02:30 with all closures expected to be re-opened by 18:50.

[A11] Mile End Road (Both directions) at the junction of [A1205] Burdett Road - Various restrictions in place to facilitate Thames Water works. Additionally, Burdett Road is reduced to one lane in both directions.
